Pages.Title: Spell Structure
Pages.Text:
A spell consists of several components that work together to create a desired effect.

Every spell is defined by:
-A target type, which determines how the targets for the spell are chosen
- The spell's effects, which are applied to a target once the spell is cast

Understanding how these components interact is key to mastering spellcrafting and creating powerful spells.

In the future, more spell parts and modifiers will be added!
